name: Roma XLI
description: Roma XLI is Facade Games' Dark Cities entry set in 41 AD Rome — senators, conspirators, praetorians, and the imperial court collide as Caligula's reign teeters on the edge of assassination. Hidden roles, whispered alliances, and wax-sealed senatorial scrolls drive a vote-driven race to control or kill an emperor. The faux-leather codex matches the rest of the series.
